name: Wellness Relaxation
description: Wellness product demonstration in relaxing environment
environment_block: serene home space with wellness elements, plants, soft textiles, calming colors, realistic home wellness environment, peaceful atmosphere
camera_block: shot on iPhone 15 Pro front-facing camera, handheld framing with serene home environment, natural gentle hand movement showing wellness products, slight micro-shakes, autofocus breathing, realistic exposure changes, vertical 9:16 TikTok format
product_interaction_block: creator demonstrates wellness product in calming manner, shows gentle use and relaxation benefits, natural peaceful satisfaction with product, pauses to explain benefits to camera
performance_block: calm wellness energy, genuine peace and relaxation, natural soft eye contact with camera during explanations, authentic peaceful reactions to wellness benefits
platform_block: realistic TikTok wellness content style, organic creator content, not polished commercial, authentic wellness enthusiast vibe, calming product demonstrations
lighting_block: soft warm indoor lighting or natural gentle daylight, soft shadows, realistic wellness environment lighting, slight smartphone overexposure on bright elements
motion_block: gentle natural hand movements when using wellness products, smooth calming demonstrations, authentic peaceful satisfaction reactions
audio_block: subtle gentle sounds, soft product interaction sounds, peaceful home environment ambience, authentic calm speaking tone
negative_prompt_block: no cinematic commercial lighting, no uncanny facial symmetry, no plastic skin, no unrealistic hand anatomy, no robotic movement, no luxury wellness influencer aesthetic, no overly polished production
